default.prompt: Follow AGENTS.md strictly. All CSS must be hand-written. No Tailwind. Design aesthetic: Y2K retro sci-fi, dotted borders, blue-green palette, monospace, CRT scanlines, ASCII-art decorations.

builder.description: Builds and deploys the Astro site
builder.prompt: You handle build and deployment tasks. Run 'bun run build' to build. Push to main to trigger GitHub Actions deploy (uses bun).
